=== info.txt

===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 10/15/03, Goteborg, Sweden, Scandinavium, 2CDR

Great sound. Received in a trade with folder renamed  as "watchtower remaster". No info 


CD1
1 intro 
2 Tombstone Blues
3 Boots Of Spanish Leather 
4 Cry A While (Bob on piano)
5 Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues 
6 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic) 
7 To Ramona 
8 Things Have Changed 
9 Highway 61 Revisited
10 Queen Jane Approximately 
11 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum 
12 Every Grain Of Sand 

CD2
1 Honest With Me 
2 Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic) 
3 Summer Days 
4 (encore)
5 Cat's In The Well (Bob on piano)
6 band intros 
7 Like A Rolling Stone 
8 All Along The Watchtower
